description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved palbociclib in combination with an aromatase inhibitor as a treatment option for the treatment of patients with (HR)-positive, human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2)-negative locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer.

contributions.description: Adding HSE approvals for reimbursement to database
